# zendesk_user_field (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk user field by ID, key, or title.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the user field. Provide one of id, key, or title.
- `key` (String) The unique key of the user field. Provide one of id, key, or title.
- `title` (String) The title of the user field. Provide one of id, key, or title.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `position` (Number)
- `system` (Boolean)
- `tag` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
